content.json:
# HDInsight Kafka Operations
Monitor controller leadership, partition health, throughput, and JVM pressure from `HDInsightKafkaMetrics`.

content.query:
HDInsightKafkaMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where MetricName in ('ActiveControllerCount', 'OfflinePartitionsCount', 'UnderReplicatedPartitions')
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, MetricValue) by MetricName
| project MetricName, LatestValue = todouble(MetricValue), LastUpdated = TimeGenerated
| order by MetricName asc
content.title: Latest cluster state
content.noDataMessage: No Kafka cluster state metrics found in HDInsightKafkaMetrics.

content.query:
HDInsightKafkaMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where MetricName in ('ActiveControllerCount', 'OfflinePartitionsCount', 'UnderReplicatedPartitions')
| summarize ActiveControllerCount = avgif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'ActiveControllerCount'), OfflinePartitionsCount = avgif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'OfflinePartitionsCount'), UnderReplicatedPartitions = avgif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'UnderReplicatedPartitions') by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
| render timechart
content.title: Cluster state over time
content.noDataMessage: No Kafka state trend data found in the selected workspace.

content.query:
HDInsightKafkaMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where MetricName in ('MessagesInPerSec', 'BytesInPerSec', 'BytesOutPerSec')
| summarize MessagesInPerSec = avgif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'MessagesInPerSec'), BytesInPerSec = avgif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'BytesInPerSec'), BytesOutPerSec = avgif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'BytesOutPerSec') by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
| render timechart
content.title: Kafka throughput
content.noDataMessage: No Kafka throughput metrics found in HDInsightKafkaMetrics.

content.query:
HDInsightKafkaMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
| where MetricNamespace == 'JVMMetrics'
| where MetricName in ('jvm_memoryheapused', 'jvm_memoryheapmax')
| summarize HeapUsed = avgif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'jvm_memoryheapused'), HeapMax = avgif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'jvm_memoryheapmax') by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
| render timechart
content.title: Broker JVM heap
content.noDataMessage: No JVM heap metrics found in HDInsightKafkaMetrics.

content.query:
let LatestHeap =
    HDInsightKafkaMetrics
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
    | where MetricNamespace == 'JVMMetrics'
    | where MetricName in ('jvm_memoryheapused', 'jvm_memoryheapmax')
    | extend Broker = case(
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('Computer', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('Computer', '')),
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('HostName', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('HostName', '')),
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('Host', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('Host', '')),
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('InstanceName', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('InstanceName', '')),
        'cluster')
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, MetricValue) by Broker, MetricName
    | summarize HeapUsedBytes = maxif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'jvm_memoryheapused'), HeapMaxBytes = maxif(todouble(MetricValue), MetricName == 'jvm_memoryheapmax') by Broker;
let LatestReplication =
    HDInsightKafkaMetrics
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(24h)
    | where MetricName == 'UnderReplicatedPartitions'
    | extend Broker = case(
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('Computer', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('Computer', '')),
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('HostName', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('HostName', '')),
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('Host', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('Host', '')),
        isnotempty(tostring(column_ifexists('InstanceName', ''))), tostring(column_ifexists('InstanceName', '')),
        'cluster')
    | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, MetricValue) by Broker
    | project Broker, UnderReplicatedPartitions = todouble(MetricValue);
LatestHeap
| join kind=fullouter LatestReplication on Broker
| project Broker = coalesce(Broker, Broker1), HeapUsedMB = round(HeapUsedBytes / 1048576.0, 2), HeapMaxMB = round(HeapMaxBytes / 1048576.0, 2), UnderReplicatedPartitions = coalesce(UnderReplicatedPartitions, 0.0)
| order by Broker asc
content.title: Latest broker state
content.noDataMessage: No broker-level metrics found in HDInsightKafkaMetrics.
